text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a peek inside the dance studio and find
Tokai Teio practicing on her own.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All right! Here's my revised Teio Step!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Huh? Uh-oh! Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gets thrown off balance mid-spin and falls
over.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ow, ow, ow.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you're here?! You should've said
something sooner!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're not interrupting! I wanted to show you
anyways!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You saw some of it, right? My revised Teio
Step! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: For the last part, I lift one foot and spin around!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's super cool when I get it right, but keeping the
momentum going is the tricky part.
choice_data_list: Try to improve your sense of balance.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, you're right! I always get dizzy halfway
through.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Oh I know! I could take ballet lessons from
Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Isn't her dad a professional ballet dancer? I'm
sure she'll know a good way to practice!
choice_data_list: I look forward to the final performance.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Everyone's eyes will be glued to the
great Teio's amazing dance!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Uuuugh! I did improve my balance, but...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I think taking that drive with Maruzen afterwards
did way more in teaching me how to keep my
balance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An unexpected bonus lesson seems to have tired
her out, but at least it was productive.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
True. I'm gonna need strength if I don't wanna get
all wobbly!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll do some weight training so I can
finish my revised Teio Step!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Do you know a good routine for building muscle
all around?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I nod.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After that, we both do some weight training.
